subject: [PATCH 15/19] nfsd: reject reclaim LOCK after RECLAIM_COMPLETE

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFSv4 server where it incorrectly accepts reclaim LOCK requests after RECLAIM_COMPLETE has been sent by a client. The fix adds a check to ensure that the per-client NFSD4_CLIENT_RECLAIM_COMPLETE bit is set before accepting a reclaim LOCK request, as required by RFC 8881. This prevents the server from accepting invalid reclaim requests and ensures data consistency.
